blended.narrative: Hudson Bay Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 39 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tuesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
